2604.08159.title: Face-D(^2)CL: Multi-Domain Synergistic Representation with Dual Continual Learning for Facial DeepFake Detection
2604.08159.paper_summary: The rapid advancement of facial forgery techniques poses severe threats to public trust and information security, making facial DeepFake detection a critical research priority. Continual learning provides an effective approach to adapt facial DeepFake detection models to evolving forgery patterns. However, existing methods face two key bottlenecks in real-world continual learning scenarios: insufficient feature representation and catastrophic forgetting. To address these issues, we propose Face-D(^2)CL, a framework for facial DeepFake detection. It leverages multi-domain synergistic representation to fuse spatial and frequency-domain features for the comprehensive capture of diverse forgery traces, and employs a dual continual learning mechanism that combines Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC), which distinguishes parameter importance for real versus fake samples, and Orthogonal Gradient Constraint (OGC), which ensures updates to task-specific adapters do not interfere with previously learned knowledge. This synergy enables the model to achieve a dynamic balance between robust anti-forgetting capabilities and agile adaptability to emerging facial forgery paradigms, all without relying on historical data replay. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method surpasses current SOTA approaches in both stability and plasticity, achieving 60.7% relative reduction in average detection error rate, respectively. On unseen forgery domains, it further improves the average detection AUC by 7.9% compared to the current SOTA method.
2604.08159.paper_summary_zh: 快速進步的臉部偽造技術對公眾信任和信息安全構成了嚴重威脅，使得臉部 DeepFake 偵測成為一項關鍵的研究優先事項。持續學習提供了一種有效的方法，能夠使臉部 DeepFake 偵測模型適應不斷演變的偽造模式。然後，現有方法在現實世界的持續學習場景中面臨兩個主要瓶頸：特徵表示不足和災難性遺忘。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了 Face-D(^2)CL，一個用於臉部 DeepFake 偵測的框架。它利用多領域協同表示來融合空間和頻域特徵，以全面捕捉多樣的偽造痕跡，並採用一種雙重持續學習機制，結合了彈性權重整合（EWC），該機制區分真實樣本與偽造樣本的參數重要性，以及正交梯度約束（OGC），確保任務特定適配器的更新不會干擾先前學到的知識。這種協同作用使模型能夠在強大的抗遺忘能力和對新興臉部偽造範式的靈活適應之間實現動態平衡，且無需依賴歷史數據重播。大量實驗表明，我們的方法在穩定性和可塑性方面超越了當前的 SOTA 方法，平均檢測錯誤率相對減少了 60.7%。在未見過的偽造領域上，與當前的 SOTA 方法相比，平均檢測 AUC 進一步提高了 7.9%。
2604.08159.author: Yushuo Zhang et.al.
2604.08159.authors: Yushuo Zhang, Yu Cheng, Yongkang Hu, Jiuan Zhou, Jiawei Chen, Yuan Xie, Zhaoxia Yin
